context: Brownfield refresh. 9 epics cover the remaining work across 104 capabilities. See phase-plan.json for the R1..R9 sequencing and exit criteria. Sprint history from the prior roadmap lives in docs/roadmap.bak.20260409/.

epics.title: Approvals & Notifications Completeness
follow_ups: VAPID / web-push background notifications (split out from 013-010 — needs hub keypair + subscription storage)
Persist custom Approve-and-Remember rule name (013-005 UI sends it, hub currently auto-generates from tool_name)

epics.title: Scheduler & Session Lifecycle Completion
follow_ups: Wire retry module (014-005) into agent:session:ended handler — needs session-to-queue-task linkage
Wire dual-stream parser (014-007) into spawn-docker / spawn-ssh stdout handling
Publish `session:event` protocol schema; agent emits it from parsed stream-json
Replace filesystem SDK fallback with real @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk client once the package ships

epics.title: Cost Tracking & Budgets
follow_ups: Wire telemetry.emit() into session cost write path (depends on stream-json → session_costs pipeline from E003 follow-ups)
Add dedicated monthly budget column to budget_config instead of deriving monthly = daily * 30
Wire budget enforcer evaluate() into a periodic sweeper in server.ts that delivers notifications via the CAP-032 router

epics.title: Workforce Completeness
follow_ups: Wire the agent's workspace-provisioner to actually send `agent:workspace:ready` + `agent:workspace:error` messages (hub handlers exist, just need the producer)
Wire flight-runner into the agent's session lifecycle so pre/post-flight commands execute in the right phase
Wire Checks API lifecycle into the job lifecycle: start on branch push, finish on job completion with annotations

epics.title: GitHub Setup Wizard & Rotation
follow_ups: Wire manifest-flow + credential-crypto into a GitHubClient factory that loads + decrypts creds on startup
Register /api/github/funnel/verify route that calls verifyFunnelUrl with the user-supplied URL
Register /api/github/manifest/callback route that calls completeManifestExchange and persists creds via encryptSecret
Wire webhook-handler.applyWebhookEvent into the existing /hooks/github route

epics.title: Docker Sandbox Hardening
follow_ups: Wire image-prepull into packages/agent/src/daemon.ts startup + schedule weekly refresh
Wire container-security-validator into the container-orchestrator create path (abort on critical mismatch)
Wire setup-container-runner into workspace-provisioner so pre-flight commands use the async runner
Register createWslSpawn as a spawn strategy alongside docker/ssh in the agent's spawn selector
Replace deploy docker-compose.yml reference to the existing network with claude-restricted

epics.title: Deployment & Operations
follow_ups: Wire loadSecret() into hub startup to read ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY from /run/secrets/*
Add crontab example or systemd timer for scripts/backup.sh in the README
Document the two-step restore procedure + add a scripts/restore.sh companion

capability_coverage_notes.summary: 6 capabilities complete today. 52 are implemented at ≥50% coverage and will be driven to complete in E009. The remaining 46 capabilities have dedicated epic coverage in R1-R8.
